backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Studiora backend, implementing user profile management, premium/trial tier logic, guest mode support, and including authorization and blob-storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (backup/restore utilities, settings page integration, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React/TypeScript frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Studiora React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all app routes, redirects the index path to /dashboard without auth checks, and conditionally shows the ProfileSetupModal for authenticated non-guest users.
frontend/src/components/AdBanner.tsx: Stub component that renders nothing; ads have been removed from the product.
frontend/src/components/AdvancedFocusSet: Premium-gated settings panel for the focus timer that allows customizing work/break intervals, ambient sounds, and viewing/clearing session history, with a paywall prompt for non-premium users.
frontend/src/components/AdvancedStatisti: Premium-gated section that renders detailed bar charts and performance analytics from progress data, showing a blurred preview and paywall prompt for non-premium users.
React component that displays AI-generated study insights as styled cards, gating full access behind a premium paywall and supporting expand/collapse for additional insights.
frontend/src/components/AIInsightsSummar: Displays a summary card of up to 2 AI-generated study insights, with states for loading, non-premium (upsell), empty, and populated data using icons and color-coded insight types.
frontend/src/components/BottomTabBar.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar with five tabs (Home, Setup, Focus, Progress, Settings) that highlights the active route and provides press-scale feedback.
frontend/src/components/CelebrationAnima: Full-screen canvas confetti burst overlay that auto-dismisses after ~2 seconds and calls onComplete, shown when all tasks are finished.
Modal dialog that prompts the user to log in with Internet Identity to enable cloud sync, triggering the login flow on confirmation.
frontend/src/components/DailyMotivationC: Displays a deterministically selected daily motivational quote from a static list, cycling by day of year.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app layout with a sticky header (logo + theme toggle), scrollable main content area, and a bottom tab bar.
frontend/src/components/NextFocusSession: Displays a card suggesting the next Pomodoro focus session based on the user's incomplete tasks or active exam, with a button to navigate to the focus page.
frontend/src/components/PaywallScreen.ts: Full-screen modal paywall listing premium features with monthly/yearly plan selection, trial start option, and subscribe/trial action handlers.
frontend/src/components/PremiumGate.tsx: Wrapper component that checks premium status and renders children if the user is premium, otherwise shows an UpgradePrompt with feature-specific messaging.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time profile setup that collects the user's name and saves it via a mutation hook; hidden for guest users.
frontend/src/components/QuickActions.tsx: Renders three quick-action buttons (Add Task, Start Focus, Progress) that navigate to their respective routes.
Shows dismissible alert banners for exams occurring within 3 days and for pending tasks scheduled for today.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: Button component that shares the study plan via the Web Share API or clipboard, cycling through idle/sharing/shared/copied/error states.
frontend/src/components/SmartStudyInsigh: Displays up to three study insights (AI-generated if premium, otherwise statically computed from task completion and subject stats) with a paywall prompt for non-premium users.
frontend/src/components/StudyCompanion.t: Renders an animated virtual plant companion that visually reflects the user's study growth stage using custom SVG illustrations for each stage (seed, sprout, seedling, young plant, blooming plant). Uses the `useStudyCompanion` hook to determine the current growth stage.
frontend/src/components/StudyTipCard.tsx: Displays a daily study tip card that cycles through 15 predefined tips based on the day of the year. Renders a styled card with a lightbulb icon and the selected tip.
frontend/src/components/ThemeSelectorSec: Renders a grid of theme preset buttons allowing users to select an app color theme, with the first three free and the rest locked behind a premium paywall. Uses `useCustomTheme` and `useConsolidatedPremiumStatus` to manage selection and access control.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A simple icon button that toggles between light and dark themes using the `useTheme` hook, displaying a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/components/UpgradePrompt.ts: Displays a premium upgrade prompt card listing key premium features with icons, and opens a `PaywallScreen` modal when the upgrade button is clicked.
frontend/src/contexts/SubscriptionContex: Creates and exports a React context and provider for subscription state, wrapping the `useSubscription` hook so subscription data is accessible throughout the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAIInsights.ts: Generates a prioritized list of AI-style study insights by applying rule-based logic to streak data, daily task completion, focus session history, and exam data. Returns typed `AIInsight` objects covering encouragement, warnings, suggestions, and feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useAmbientSound.ts: Provides a custom hook that creates AudioContext-based ambient sound generators (white noise, rain, or cafe) using Web Audio API nodes with filters and modulation, returning a cleanup function to stop playback.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackupRestore.ts: Manages backup and restore operations for app data, handling loading states, success/error messages with auto-clear timers, and React Query cache invalidation after a successful restore.
frontend/src/hooks/useCelebrationTrigger: Tracks whether a celebration animation should be shown when daily progress reaches 100%, limiting the trigger to once per day using localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useCloudSync.ts: Provides a simple cloud sync hook that returns whether data was synced or a sign-in prompt should be shown, based on whether the user is in guest mode.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomTheme.ts: Manages app color theme selection from a set of OKLCH-based presets, persisting the active theme to localStorage and applying CSS custom properties to the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useExamCountdown.ts: Calculates the number of days remaining until an exam date (stored in nanoseconds), returning flags for whether the exam is today or in the past.
frontend/src/hooks/useFocusSessionHistor: Manages a persisted history of up to 10 focus sessions in localStorage, exposing functions to add new sessions and clear the history.
frontend/src/hooks/useGuestMode.ts: Manages guest mode state with a persistent device ID in localStorage, defaulting new users to guest mode and providing enter/exit callbacks.
frontend/src/hooks/useGuestToAuthMigrati: Provides a callback to migrate a guest user to an authenticated state by clearing the guest mode flag, with a placeholder for future data merging.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalDailyProgress: Tracks daily study progress (completed vs. total count) in localStorage, automatically resetting counts on a new day and computing a completion percentage.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalProfile.ts: Manages a user's display name persisted in localStorage, providing a getter and a setter that trims whitespace before saving.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStreak.ts: Custom React hook that tracks a daily study streak in localStorage, automatically resetting it if more than one day is missed and providing an `incrementStreak` function to record activity.
frontend/src/hooks/usePaywallTrigger.ts: Custom hook that manages paywall visibility logic using localStorage, showing the paywall only after a task has been completed and the user hasn't dismissed it.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for exam CRUD and study plan operations, supporting both authenticated backend calls and a guest mode that generates and persists study plans locally in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useShareStudyPlan.ts: Custom hook that builds a formatted text summary of the active exam's study plan and exposes a `shareStudyPlan` function that uses the Web Share API with a clipboard fallback.
frontend/src/hooks/useStudyCompanion.ts: Custom hook that computes a virtual study companion's growth stage (0–5) and progress percentage based on the user's current streak and completed focus sessions, persisting state to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscription.ts: Custom hook that manages subscription state (free, trial, monthly, yearly) using localStorage, including trial expiry checking, subscribe, startTrial, and cancelSubscription actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Custom hook that manages light/dark theme state, persisting the preference to localStorage and toggling the `dark` class on the document root.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for an indigo-based light and dark color palette, and sets up background image and glass-card utility styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page showing today's tasks, exam countdown, streak, daily progress, and motivational components with task toggle functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ExamSetup.tsx: Form page for creating a new exam study plan with subjects and topics, enforcing a paywall for multiple exams and requiring authentication.
frontend/src/pages/FocusMode.tsx: Pomodoro-style focus timer page with work/break phases, session history tracking, and premium ambient sound support.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Landing/login page that allows users to authenticate via Internet Identity or enter guest mode, with feature highlights.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressTracking.tsx: Progress tracking page displaying weekly study stats, streak, daily progress, a bar chart of completed tasks, and an AI insights panel.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page component that handles user profile editing, theme toggling, authentication (login/logout via Internet Identity), subscription/trial status display, and cloud backup/restore actions with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/types/features.ts: Defines the `PremiumFeature` union type and a `FEATURE_CONFIG` record mapping each premium feature to its display name, description, and icon, plus an ordered `PREMIUM_FEATURES` array.
frontend/src/utils/backup.ts: Provides `createBackup` and `restoreBackup` utilities that serialize/deserialize all relevant localStorage keys into a versioned JSON file, using the Web Share API when available and falling back to a programmatic download/file-picker.
frontend/src/utils/premiumCheck.ts: Custom hook `useConsolidatedPremiumStatus` that combines subscription context and actor fetching state to expose a unified premium/trial status with a loading flag.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that enables dark mode via class, registers custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows, keyframe animations, and includes the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing Studiora's architecture, existing features (backup/restore, settings UI, subscription), known issues, and versioning metadata for build planning.
